description: Lists BIM Model Revisions associated with the specified Project.

parameters.name: view
parameters.description:
The compact view contains only ids.
The normal view does not include the attribute 'published_model', and contains 'bim_gridline_id' instead of object.
The extended view contains the response shown...

parameters.name: filters[id]
parameters.description: Return item(s) with the specified IDs.

parameters.name: filters[bim_file_id]
parameters.description: Filter item(s) with matching BIM File ids

parameters.name: filters[bim_model_id]
parameters.description: Filter item(s) with matching Bim Model ids.

parameters.name: sort
parameters.description: Sort item(s) by an attribute. The default sort is ascending. To sort in descending order, prepend the sort value with a hyphen character '-'

401.description: User does not have permission to view BIM Model Revisions

403.description: User does not have permission to view BIM Model Revisions
